name: megaplan
description: A graph-based VS Code collaboration surface for agent planning, execution, and review.

megaplan.bridgeBaseUrl.description: Base URL for the local Megaplan bridge-agent.

megaplan.autoConnect.description: Automatically connect to the bridge-agent when the panel opens.

scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:webview && npm run build:extension && npm run build:bridge
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace @megaplan/shared run typecheck && npm --workspace @megaplan/webview run typecheck && npm --workspace @megaplan/extension run typecheck && npm --workspace @megaplan/bridge-agent run typecheck
scripts.test: npm --workspace @megaplan/shared run test && npm --workspace @megaplan/extension run test && npm --workspace @megaplan/bridge-agent run test
